Our Story

Born from a search for something real

LUSÍN Jewelry was born out of a personal search — founder Elina Nakhapetyan was looking for ethical jewelry that would reflect her Armenian roots while matching her minimalistic, personal taste. Unable to find what she envisioned, she went directly to a jeweler and described her dream piece.

That first creation — a sun and eternity necklace — became the spark that launched an entire brand. The name LUSÍN means 'moon' in Armenian, a symbol proudly worn in the brand's crescent logo.

Drawing inspiration from the moon, mountains, and earth alongside ancient Armenian ornaments, LUSÍN creates jewelry that is as culturally rich as it is beautifully minimal. What sets LUSÍN apart is interactivity: transformer pendants, magnet rings, hoop earrings that double as brooches.

— Elina Nakhapetyan, Founder of LUSÍN

Discover the Collection

The Collection

Each Piece, A Heritage

Ethnic but minimalistic. Nature-inspired but culturally rooted. Every LUSÍN piece is created to be worn multiple ways, and to carry meaning long after it's gifted.

♥ Give Back
Armenian Knot Ring
From $45 USD
Inspired by the traditional double knot of Armenian carpet weaving, honoring the women weavers of Armenia. 5% of every sale donated to supporting women & girls in Armenia.
VANUÍ Collection
From $50 USD
A fan-favourite collection embodying Elina's signature blend of ethnic minimalism and innovative design — pieces praised as 'absolutely to die for' by the #lusingirl community.
Old Moon Pendants
From $40 USD
Crescent moon pendants at the heart of the LUSÍN identity, featuring interactive hanging moon and star charms for an endlessly customizable celestial look.
Sky Map Jewelry
From $55 USD
A collection mapping the night sky onto wearable art, combining astronomical beauty with LUSÍN's signature minimalist Armenian aesthetic — wear your constellation.
Armenian Alphabet Collection
From $35 USD
Jewelry celebrating the unique and ancient Armenian alphabet — carry your language and heritage as a personal, elegant statement piece worn close to the heart.
Transformer Hoop Earrings
From $48 USD
Innovative hoops designed to be reconfigured as mono earrings, pendants, or brooches. One piece — a wardrobe of possibilities. The future of how jewelry should work.

Materials & Craft

Made with intention,
worn with meaning

Every LUSÍN piece begins with a conversation — between the founder, the craftsperson, and the cultural memory embedded in Armenian artistic traditions. From the carpet weavers of Yerevan to the ancient stone carvings of khachkars, each design draws from a living heritage.

LUSÍN uses responsibly sourced metals and stones, ensuring that beauty never comes at an ethical cost. Each piece is handcrafted in small batches, retaining the warmth and individuality that only human hands can give.

Ethical Sourcing

Every material chosen with care for the planet and for the communities who produce it.

Armenian Heritage

Ancient ornamental symbols and cultural motifs transformed into everyday elegance.

Transformer Design

Each piece engineered to wear in multiple configurations — jeweler meets engineer.

Small-Batch Craft

Limited production ensures every piece retains the soul of handmade creation.

Bespoke Commissions

Your story,
crafted in gold

Just as Elina once described her dream piece to a jeweler and saw it come to life, LUSÍN now offers that same magic to you. Commission a custom piece rooted in your own heritage, your own symbols, your own moon.

🌙

Personal Consultation

Connect with Elina directly via Instagram DM to share your vision, references, and the story behind the piece you want created.

✦

Cultural Co-Creation

Whether it's an Armenian letter, a family symbol, or a celestial map, LUSÍN translates meaning into wearable, minimal jewelry.

🪢

Handcrafted in Yerevan

Every bespoke piece is handmade by skilled Yerevan artisans, ensuring the highest quality and deepest intention in every detail.
